title: senna timoriensis
intro: Senna timoriensis, also known as Timor senna, is a plant species native to the island of Timor in Indonesia. It is a type of legume, belonging to the Fabaceae family, and is used for its medicinal properties, particularly as a laxative and to treat various digestive issues. The plant's medicinal properties are attributed to its sennosides content, which stimulates bowel movements and helps to relieve constipation. Senna timoriensis is typically prepared as a herbal tea or capsule, with the dried leaves and pods being used to make infusions for relieving digestive discomfort.
